creator: lightside@gmx.com
text:
Created attachment 159414
Proposed patch (since 389767 revision)

Patch to update deskutils/treesheets port from 0.0.20150519 to 0.0.20150711 version.

Look following link for changes:
https://github.com/aardappel/treesheets/compare/69990a2...3a6be83

The source code changes introduced PACKAGE_VERSION C/C++ define, which is possible to use inside of Makefile. As I understood, the purpose of it is to define package version (e.g. PORTVERSION) instead of build date, which changes description inside of "Help -> About..." application dialog.

- Add PACKAGE_VERSION variable to MAKE_ENV, which defines version of package instead of build date
